what_it_does: Records metadata for an image attachment in the design-assets channel, mapping an attachment ID to a target icon asset URI.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
standouts: Target uses an image:// URI scheme pointing to design-assets/icons/Icon_Users
Record is purely metadata with no embedded image data
conventions: Attachment IDs use the att- prefix
concerns: Target URI does not include a file extension or verifiable path from this file alone
No author or source message reference is recorded
notes: This is a ledger entry that maps attachment att-62dc77bf to the Icon_Users image asset in the design-assets channel.
questions: Is image://design-assets/icons/Icon_Users a single file or a collection?
Where is the actual image data stored relative to this URI?
What channel message or conversation does this attachment belong to?
purpose_vs_actual: The file states it is an images attachment targeting an icon asset, which matches its content.
intention_signals: Catalog a design asset attachment so it can be looked up by ID and linked to a specific icon image URI.
novelty: The image:// URI scheme for referencing design assets is a notable convention.
contribution: Provides a stable, timestamped attachment record that associates a channel attachment ID with a design asset URI, supporting lookup and provenance for design assets.
summary_for_embedding: Markdown ledger record for attachment att-62dc77bf in the design-assets channel, typed as images, targeting image://design-assets/icons/Icon_Users with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: Track and reference the Icon_Users icon image as an attachment within the design-assets channel.
